title: Vec<&Form> temp alloc in every test eval
description: eval_header_test, eval_address_test, eval_envelope_test, and eval_exists_test each begin with 'let refs: Vec<&Form> = forms.iter().collect()' to adapt &[Form] into &[&Form] for the extract_* helper functions. This allocates a Vec on every test evaluation. The extract_match_type, extract_comparator, and extract_address_part helpers should be redesigned to accept &[Form] directly (iterating over references internally), removing the adapter allocation at each call site.
notes: Duplicate of ruj.1 and ruj.2 which already cover the Vec<&Form> allocation issue.
